requirement_topic.en: IEC 62196 vs GB/T 20234 Connector Standard — Critical Hardware Gap
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62196与GB/T 20234插座标准——关键硬件差距
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62196與GB/T 20234插座標準——關鍵硬體差距

summary.en: Morocco's EV charging infrastructure aligns with the IEC 62196 connector family, consistent with the European practice adopted across North Africa and EU-aligned markets. AC charging uses the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) connector, and DC fast charging uses the IEC 62196-3 Combined Charging System (CCS) Combo 2 interface. IMANOR NM adoption of IEC 61851 references the corresponding IEC 62196 connector types. Any EV charger with a fixed cable or socket outlet must carry the correct connector type for the Moroccan market. Chinese chargers using GB/T 20234.2 (AC, 7-pin) or GB/T 20234.3 (DC) connectors are physically incompatible with Moroccan EVs charging via IEC 62196 sockets.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥EV充电基础设施与IEC 62196插座系列对齐，与北非及欧盟对标市场所采用的欧洲实践一致。交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）插座，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3组合充电系统（CCS）Combo 2接口。IMANOR NM采标IEC 61851引用相应的IEC 62196插座类型。任何固定电缆或插座式EV充电设备须为摩洛哥市场配备正确的插座类型。使用GB/T 20234.2（交流，7针）或GB/T 20234.3（直流）插座的中国充电设备与通过IEC 62196插座充电的摩洛哥EV实体不兼容。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥EV充電基礎設施與IEC 62196插座系列對齊，與北非及歐盟對標市場所採用的歐洲實踐一致。交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）插座，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3組合充電系統（CCS）Combo 2介面。IMANOR NM採標IEC 61851引用相應的IEC 62196插座類型。任何固定電纜或插座式EV充電設備須為摩洛哥市場配備正確的插座類型。使用GB/T 20234.2（交流，7針）或GB/T 20234.3（直流）插座的中國充電設備與通過IEC 62196插座充電的摩洛哥EV實體不兼容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-1 (general requirements for plugs, socket-outlets, and vehicle connectors)
IMANOR NM adoption of IEC 61851 (referencing IEC 62196 connector types)

summary.en: Chinese EV chargers use GB/T 20234.1 (general requirements), GB/T 20234.2 (AC 7-pin connector), and GB/T 20234.3 (DC connector) standards. These connectors are incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS Combo 2 (DC) physically and electrically. Chinese manufacturers exporting to Morocco must equip chargers with IEC 62196-2 or IEC 62196-3 connectors and pass IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 testing on the Morocco-spec hardware.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备采用GB/T 20234.1（通用要求）、GB/T 20234.2（交流7针插座）和GB/T 20234.3（直流插座）标准。这些插座与IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）在物理和电气上不兼容。出口摩洛哥的中国制造商必须为充电设备配备IEC 62196-2或IEC 62196-3插座，并对摩洛哥规格硬件通过IEC 61851-1/IEC 61851-23测试。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備採用GB/T 20234.1（通用要求）、GB/T 20234.2（交流7針插座）和GB/T 20234.3（直流插座）標準。這些插座與IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）在物理和電氣上不兼容。出口摩洛哥的中國製造商必須為充電設備配備IEC 62196-2或IEC 62196-3插座，並對摩洛哥規格硬體通過IEC 61851-1/IEC 61851-23測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1 (EV conductive charging system — equivalent to IEC 61851-1)

gap.en: This is a hardware gap, not a documentation gap. Chinese EV charger models intended for Morocco must be built or re-tooled with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (AC) or IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 (DC) connectors and sockets. Chinese GB/T 20234 connector tooling cannot simply be relabelled. Test reports for the Morocco export model must be conducted on the IEC-connector hardware variant, not on the GB/T variant.
gap.zh: 这是硬件差距，而非文件差距。面向摩洛哥的中国电动汽车充电设备型号必须配备或改装IEC 62196-2 Type 2（交流）或IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2（直流）插座。中国GB/T 20234插座模具不能简单重新贴标。摩洛哥出口型号的测试报告须在IEC插座硬件型号上进行，而非GB/T型号。
gap.zht: 這是硬體差距，而非文件差距。面向摩洛哥的中國電動汽車充電設備型號必須配備或改裝IEC 62196-2 Type 2（交流）或IEC 62196-3 CCS Combo 2（直流）插座。中國GB/T 20234插座模具不能簡單重新貼標。摩洛哥出口型號的測試報告須在IEC插座硬體型號上進行，而非GB/T型號。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — physical incompatibility with Moroccan EVs if GB/T connectors are used; IEC 62196 connector compliance is required for interoperability and IMANOR / ONEE market acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic market — GB/T 20234 connectors are required; incompatible with IEC 62196 sockets

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is the most critical hardware gap. Chinese GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with Morocco's IEC 62196 market. EV chargers for Morocco must be built and tested with IEC 62196-2 (Type 2 AC) or IEC 62196-3 (CCS Combo 2 DC) connectors — a separate product variant is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是最关键的硬件差距。中国GB/T 20234插座与摩洛哥IEC 62196市场实体不兼容。面向摩洛哥的电动汽车充电设备必须使用IEC 62196-2（Type 2交流）或IEC 62196-3（CCS Combo 2直流）插座进行制造和测试——需要独立的产品型号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是最關鍵的硬體差距。中國GB/T 20234插座與摩洛哥IEC 62196市場實體不兼容。面向摩洛哥的電動汽車充電設備必須使用IEC 62196-2（Type 2交流）或IEC 62196-3（CCS Combo 2直流）插座進行製造和測試——需要獨立的產品型號。
